subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the majesty and the power, the glory and the dominion. None can withhold Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه و الاقتدار و العزه و الاختیار لایمنعه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
